derivation_layer.source_latex: \tzpsection{Direct Equation Progression} \begin{enumerate}[leftmargin=1.6em,itemsep=7pt,topsep=4pt] \item \textbf{Canonical Relation} \[ DegeneracyKernel := ShannonEntropy[ H = -{i=1}^64 p_i log(p_i) where p_i = frequency[codon_i], H_max = log(64) = 6 bits, H_actual 4.32 bits ( Due to redundancy ) \] This relation is retained from the source-repair evidence for bio quantum channel analysis. \item \textbf{Support Relation} \[ The hyper-dimensional span $\HD$ is given by S\_HD:=$\int$U∣det⁡h∣ dnxS\textbackslash\_\{\text\{HD\}\}:=\int\_\{\mathcal\{U\}\}\sqrt\{\textbar\textbackslash det h\textbar\}\textbackslash,\text\{d\}\^{}n xS\_HD:=$\int$U∣deth∣dnx, where U\mathcal\{U\}U is a neighbourhood of ppp in which the dimension varies according to ID\,003 and hhh denotes the induced metric on the extended dimensional space.\\ \] This relation is retained from the source-repair evidence for bio quantum channel analysis. \item \textbf{Closure Relation} \[ The tripartite channel architecture predicts that resonant beat frequencies occur at\\ 𝑓res=𝑓0𝛼,fres=f0$\alpha$,\\ where 𝑓0f0 is a base frequency and 𝛼$\alpha$ is the fine-structure constant. Each measurement across the channels yields an information density of log⁡2(153,600)$\approx$17.23log2(153,600)$\approx$17.23 bits.\\ \] This relation is retained from the source-repair evidence for bio quantum channel analysis. \item \textbf{Auxiliary Relation} \[ T_{\mathrm{IM}} \;=\; \frac{1}{u_T} \int_{\Sigma} \phi_{m_1}^* \, \mathcal{L} \, \phi_{m_2} \, \mathrm{d}\Sigma \] This relation is retained from the source-repair evidence for bio quantum channel analysis. \item \textbf{Review Relation} \[ \mathcal{L}_U = \frac{c^4}{16\pi G}\,R[g] \, + \, \mathcal{L}_{QFT}[\Psi, A_$\mu$] \, + \, \mathcal{L}_{topo}[A_$\mu$] \, + \, \mathcal{L}_{info}[\Phi] \, + \, \mathcal{L}_{bio}[\Xi]. \] This relation is retained from the source-repair evidence for bio quantum channel analysis. \end{enumerate} \tzpsection{Proof} The proof route is review-conditioned: verify that the listed source equations are mutually admissible in the entry's TRAWIN-normalized frame.
